userText: One of the advantages of have breakfast is it can provide the energy to you to support your working whole day.
correctedText: One of the advantages of having breakfast is that it can give you the energy to work through the whole day.
generalAdvice: 你已经抓住了 one of the advantages of ... is ... 这个骨架。下一步重点是 of 后面用动名词，以及更自然的能量表达。

issues.note: of 后面这里不能直接接动词原形 have，要改成 having。
issues.suggestion: 介词后优先检查是否要用动名词，比如 of having breakfast, by reading more。

issues.note: is it can ... 不自然，这里更完整的是 is that it can ...。
issues.suggestion: 把 is that it can ... 当成一个小骨架整体记住。

issues.note: provide the energy to you to support your working whole day 不自然。
issues.suggestion: 更自然地说 give you the energy to work through the whole day 或 give you energy for the day。
